task_completion.description: A folder named 'Mississippi_Sinuosity' is created in the Places sidebar to organize the items.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Places' panel in the application sidebar shows a folder labeled 'Mississippi_Sinuosity'.

task_completion.description: Placemarks 'Sinuosity_Start' and 'Sinuosity_End' are created at the specified coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Map view or sidebar shows placemarks named 'Sinuosity_Start' and 'Sinuosity_End'. The map view should show them located on the Mississippi River.

task_completion.description: The agent visually traces the river channel to measure its length.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'Ruler' tool (Path tab) or a 'Path' object being drawn that closely follows the curves/meanders of the river between the start and end points.

task_completion.description: A placemark named 'Sinuosity_Analysis' is created roughly at the midpoint between the start and end.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A placemark labeled 'Sinuosity_Analysis' is visible on the map between the start and end placemarks.

task_completion.description: The analysis description records accurate straight-line and channel distances.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Description' field of the 'Sinuosity_Analysis' placemark is visible (e.g., in properties window) and shows a Straight-line distance approx 21.8 km (20-23 acceptable) and Channel length approx 35-40 km.

task_completion.description: The analysis description records the correct sinuosity index and classification.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Description' field shows a Sinuosity Index between 1.6 and 1.8 and the Classification 'Meandering'.

task_completion.description: The folder is saved as a KML file to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save File' dialog or file browser window shows the file 'mississippi_sinuosity.kml' being saved to or existing in the 'Documents' folder.

integrity.description: The agent uses the Google Earth (or GIS) GUI to perform tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with the application's toolbar, sidebar, or map view, rather than command-line scripts.

integrity.description: The agent does not manually write KML/XML code in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like Notepad, VS Code) are seen containing raw KML XML tags.

integrity.description: Distances are derived from tool usage, not external lookup.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Ruler tool or Path properties window is visible at some point, displaying the distance values that are later recorded.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Start Coords: 33.4000, -91.0500. End Coords: 33.2500, -91.2000. Expected Straight-Line Distance: ~21.8 km. Expected Channel Length: ~35-40 km. Expected Sinuosity Index: ~1.6-1.8. Expected Classification: 'Meandering'.
